ddls:
CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement entry */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of measurement (e.g., Waist Size, Crotch Height) */,
  "size_category_id" INTEGER /* Size category (e.g., 25, 26, 27, etc.) */,
  "measurement_value_cm" REAL /* Measurement value in centimeters */,
  "measurement_value_inch" REAL /* Measurement value in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_size_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_categories" (
  "size_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size category */,
  "size_label" TEXT /* Label for the size category (e.g., 25, 26, 27) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_types" (
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of measurement */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., Waist Size) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., USA, Europe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_size_measurements" (
  "region_size_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region-specific size measurement entry */,
  "size_category_id" INTEGER /* Size category (e.g., 25, 26, 27, etc.) */,
  "measurement_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of measurement (e.g., Waist Size, Crotch Height) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region (e.g., USA, Europe) */,
  "measurement_value_cm" REAL /* Measurement value in centimeters */,
  "measurement_value_inch" REAL /* Measurement value in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_size_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_size_measurements_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_size_measurements_size_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_size_measurements_measurement_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_type_id") REFERENCES measurement_types ("measurement_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "size_category_id" INTEGER /* Size category (e.g., 25, 26, 27, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer feedback entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Product associated with the feedback */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was received */,
  "feedback_description" TEXT /* Description of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role of the user (e.g., designer, manager) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., designer, manager) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurement_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Measurement associated with the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_value_cm" REAL /* Value of the measurement in centimeters */,
  "version_value_inch" REAL /* Value of the measurement in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurement_versions_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES size_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "size_category_id" INTEGER /* Size category associated with the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., size trend, fitting issues) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_size_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_standardizations" (
  "standardization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standardization effort */,
  "size_category_id" INTEGER /* Size category being standardized */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Region where standardization is applied */,
  "standardization_date" TEXT /* Date of the standardization effort */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the standardization (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standardization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_standardizations_size_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_category_id") REFERENCES size_categories ("size_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_standardizations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements_audit" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the measurement associated with the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., added, updated) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_developments" (
  "development_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product development entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Product under development */,
  "development_date" TEXT /* Date of the development entry */,
  "design_stage" TEXT /* Current stage of product design (e.g., conceptual, prototype) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("development_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_developments_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
